query: North Korea nuclear test 2026 - any signs of imminent 7th nuclear test, activity at Punggye-ri test site, recent statements or preparations mid-2026
answer:
I've completed my research on signs of an imminent 7th North Korean nuclear test as of mid-2026.

**Summary of findings:**

- **No imminent test signals.** North Korea's Punggye-ri site remains technically ready but shows no active detonation-preparation indicators. The most recent detailed satellite imagery (Nov 3, 2025) showed no instruments, cables, power lines, vehicles, or personnel activity — only small cultivated plots.

- **Technical readiness confirmed.** Tunnel No. 3 (reopened ~May 2022) is physically capable of hosting a test. On Nov 5, 2025, South Korea's Defense Intelligence Agency assessed a 7th test could occur "within a short period of time" pending only Kim Jong Un's order, likely to test miniaturized/tactical warheads.

- **Readiness ≠ imminence.** Analysts consistently stress the timing is a political decision governed by diplomatic/security variables, not technical constraints.

- **2026 focus is on production, not testing.** On June 3, 2026, Kim inspected a new uranium enrichment plant and pledged to expand nuclear forces "at an exponential rate" (capacity "more than doubled" in five years) — with no mention of testing or Punggye-ri. The July 7, 2026 AEI/ISW update reported no nuclear test or test-site activity.

- **No test has occurred** as of the July 11, 2026 research date; the last (6th) test was September 2017.

The full markdown report, structured key facts, sources, and quantitative data points have been delivered via the StructuredOutput tool.
